message:
feat(core): add fault isolation bridge methods and convenience API

Adds healthy_count, unhealthy_count, total_faults, total_restarts,
domain_faults, domain_restarts, all_healthy, to_invariant_domain,
and config accessor. 6 unit tests. (ft-2p9cb.6.1.2)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
